title: The Stone Colossus
intro: The quarry golems answer to a colossus of living stone. Break it, and the road to the keep lies open. Survive it, and you will be ready to ascend beyond what you are.
objectiveText: Destroy the Stone Colossus in the Cinder Quarry
completeText: You shattered the unshatterable. You are ready — seek your ascension when your legend is great enough.
